input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add workspace description to onboarding flow

Display workspace description in bootstrap and conversation views. Update workspace creation to optionally accept and persist a description field, customize onboarding starter messages based on description presence, and expose description in the workspace bootstrap response for client-side rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "Add workspace description to onboarding flow" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary

Add workspace description support to the onboarding flow. Users can now optionally provide a workspace description during creation, which is displayed in bootstrap and conversation views. The onboarding experience customizes its initial message and topic focus based on whether a description is provided.

## Changes

- Client-side: Add description textarea to workspace creation form
- Server: Persist description in workspace records and expose in API responses
- Onboarding: Customize initial message and topic list based on description presence

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Great! The PR has been created successfully. Let me provide a summary to the user.

content.text:
✅ **PR created successfully!**

**PR #108:** [Add workspace description to onboarding flow](https://github.com/marcus-sa/brain/pull/108)

**Summary of changes:**
- Added optional `description` field to workspace creation form (client-side textarea)
- Workspace description is persisted and returned in API bootstrap/conversation responses
- Customized onboarding messages and topic focus based on description presence:
  - With description: skips asking "what business/venture" and focuses on projects/areas
  - Without description: follows standard onboarding flow covering business, projects, people, decisions, tools, bottlenecks
- Updated contracts, types, and context builders to propagate description through the chat pipeline

**Files modified:** 12 files changed, 90 insertions, 16 deletions
